reference: This morning I was sitting in the front seat of my car when I turned around to the back seat to buckle my daughter in her seat. Suddenly, I felt a sharp pain shoot up my back. Now, I cannot stand up straight, and going from a sitting down to a standing up position is excruciating. I have to help myself get up with support by holding onto the table. What could have happened and how do I fix it?
text: This morning, I was sitting in the front seat of my car when I turned around to the back buckle my daughter in her seat. Suddenly, I felt a sharp pain shoot up my back. Now, I cannot stand up straight, and going from a sitting down to a standing up position is excruciating. I have to help myself get up in support by holding onto the table. What could have happened? How do I fix it?
